creator: alex@cichlids.com
text:
fix checksum: (bento reported)

diff -rNu orig/greed.81p/CHANGES new/greed.81p/CHANGES
--- orig/greed.81p/CHANGES      Thu Jan 20 19:31:46 2000
+++ new/greed.81p/CHANGES       Wed Apr 26 16:43:39 2000
@@ -127,3 +127,7 @@
                         Added GTK greed into Beta 6 and released it with
                         .81+ STABLE.  Proxies work again ;)  Sorry for
                         breaking the code for them in the last 2 releases.
+                        regzip'ed the man page for merger with debian
+                        packages.
+
+Next planned release:  .99a, Summer 2000
Binary files orig/greed.81p/greed.1.gz and new/greed.81p/greed.1.gz differ

Fix: cvs diff: Diffing .
cvs diff: Diffing files
